data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. BRAVEHEART finished fourth of seven when resuming from a spell two runs back then finished a game second of 10 over 1110m at Doomben after having raced on the speed into the turn when well supported. Racing in an easier line-up has winning claims. 6. IVANTHEINVINCIBLE scored his maiden win last start when on debut at Grafton over 1115m when leading all of the way as the warm favourite. Looks a smart type of a gelding and will be well fancied to go back-to-back. 13. BETTER SWEET missed the frame in town last start when finishing fifth of eight at Eagle Farm after getting checked with 250m to run. Racing in an easier line-up and with a 1.5kg claimer taking over the reins can finish in the money. 3. CARNEGIE HILL resumes from a spell and having won fresh-up last prep is worth including in combinations.","runners":[2,6,13,3],"exclusive":true}
